title: Geepas Single Ceramic Hot Plate, 1200W – Portable Infrared Electric Hob Cooker - Table Top Single Burner Cooktop, Adjustable Temperature, Overheat - Great to use at Campsites Caravans - 1200W, Black
features: ✅ TEMPERATURE CONTROL, OVERHEAT PROTECTION - Make heating much easier; Thermostatically controlled variable heating settings provide prefect temperature for your cooking from boil to simmer as well as can be used as food warmer or slow cooker. With added safety features for peace of mind along with non-slip feet ensure safe use.
✅ MAKES COOKING SIMPLE - It's so easy to use. Just plug it in, turn the knob, and you're ready to cook. Its small size means your portable electric stove is also a easy to store away when not in use.

✅ POWERFUL SINGLE ELECTRIC HOB - The 1200 wattage means your single hot plate electric stove heats up rapidly and is ready as soon as you are. A handy additional cooking tool as an accessory to normal stove, can be used around home, garden, workplace or caravanning, adding flexibility to your kitchen.

✅ DURABLE, EASY TO CLEAN & CARRY, POWER INDICATOR - A power indicator for indicating that the hotplate is on and hot. It is perfect for camping and travelling as it can be easily moved around and is made to last. Its durable ceramic glass surface is easy to wipe clean. Its two side-handles allow safe carrying of your portable cooker.

✅ COMPACT & PORTABLE, NON-SLIP RUBBER FEET - This hot plate is not only compact for easy storage, but also portable. We built this hot plate with safety and convenience in mind - The feet of this single hot plate is non-slip.
description: Product Description POWER INDICATOR Power indicator light clearly shows when the hotplate is on and heating, ensuring safe and easy cooking every time. TEMPERATURE CONTROL Thermostatically controlled heating settings deliver precise temperature control for perfect cooking from boil to simmer. POWERFUL ELECTRIC HOB The powerful 1200W single hot plate heats up fast, ensuring quick, efficient cooking whenever you’re ready. CERAMIC COOKING SURFACE Ceramic plates ensure even heat distribution for smooth styling results and long-lasting durability every time. OVERHEAT PROTECTION Designed with advanced safety features, this appliance ensures reliable performance and peace of mind every time. NON-SLIP RUBBER FEET With anti-skid feet, this hot plate stays stable and secure, preventing movement for safe, hassle-free cooking. EASY TO CLEAN Durable ceramic surface ensures effortless cleaning—simply let it cool and wipe with a clean cloth for lasting shine. EASY TO USE Effortless cooking made simple—just plug in, turn the knob, and enjoy perfectly cooked meals every time.
